summary: RIDEMIND v2 features tested end-to-end. Backend: 18/19 pytest tests passing (1 pre-existing assertion was outdated due to SPOTS list expansion - fixed). All 5 new tests pass: geo+radius filter (Paris 600km excludes Tarifa/Dakhla/Brésil/USA, includes French spots with distance_km), backwards-compat (no geo => no distance_km), tiny radius (50km => empty + friendly advice), video-analysis structured JSON (headline, diagnostic, 3-5 corrections, 2-3 drills, securite, niveau_estime), history endpoint still returns past analyses with structured field. Frontend: Spot Finder city search (Hyères -> Open-Meteo geocoding returned 'Hyères, Région PACA, France'), radius slider (default 500km) appears after location set, top spots show distance_km badges (e.g. '129.4 KM' for Beauduc from Hyères), Conseil IA panel rendered. Video Analysis structured rendering: SYNTHÈSE banner (blue gradient), DIAGNOSTIC, POINTS À CORRIGER (numbered 01/02/03/04), DRILLS, SÉCURITÉ - all sections rendered correctly with Claude Sonnet 4.5 JSON output.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 623 lines - approaching split threshold; consider extracting auth, checkout, video-analysis, spots into separate routers/modules.
video-analysis endpoint stores uploaded videos on local disk (UPLOAD_DIR) - won't survive pod restarts; consider object storage (already flagged in iteration 1).

When `req.max_distance_km` is None but user_lat/lon are provided, candidate_spots gets distance_km added but no filter applied (all 19 spots considered). Score bonus for proximity is gated on `req.max_distance_km` so behavior is correct, just noting.
CORS still uses allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True (flagged previously) - browsers reject this combo for credentialed requests.

Claude JSON parsing has a graceful fallback when response is not valid JSON, but the structured.corrections/drills become empty arrays in that case - frontend handles it (sections are skipped). Good defensive coding.

success_rate.backend: 100% (19/19 after fixing outdated spot count assertion; 5/5 on new v2 features)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Spot Finder geocoding+distance flow + Video Analysis structured rendering)

seed_data_creation: Reused premium user from iteration 1. Standard and free users still in DB from iteration 1 tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both v2 features (geo radius + structured video analysis) verified end-to-end. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py now has 19 tests including 5 new v2 tests. Frontend route for video analysis is /video-analysis (not /analyse - the nav link 'ANALYSE' points to /video-analysis). Test credentials and seed data instructions in /app/memory/test_credentials.md remain valid.
rca of the issue: N/A - no issues found in v2 features. The single pre-existing test_spots_weather failure was due to SPOTS list being expanded from 6 to 19 entries in v2 (a positive change); test assertion updated from `== 6` to `>= 6`.
